title: selago centralis
intro: Selago centralis, also known as the Bloukrans or Blaauwkrans plant, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Pediculariaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago centralis include relief from fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
